# Openinvite

> Openinvite is a wedding planning app and wedding website builder with a one-time payment. Plan your wedding, build your wedding website and send digital wedding invitations, all in one place.

## Product

Openinvite helps couples plan their wedding in one app: guest list and RSVP management, budget tracking, a wedding website builder with 20 design themes, digital wedding invitations, a schedule and vendor management, and Ava, an AI wedding planning assistant. A partner, planner or family member can be invited as a collaborator to help plan.

## Pricing

Openinvite uses one-time pricing, not a subscription.

- Pro: USD 59, AUD 79
- Ultra: USD 109, AUD 149

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.openinvite.com.au/
- Features: https://www.openinvite.com.au/features
- Pricing: https://www.openinvite.com.au/pricing
- Ava, the AI wedding assistant: https://www.openinvite.com.au/ava
- Universes, the wedding website design themes: https://www.openinvite.com.au/universes
- About: https://www.openinvite.com.au/about
- Contact: https://www.openinvite.com.au/contact
